selected_issue.title: contract_diagnostics omitted bomb_time_remaining_s, blocking full post-plant timer-state diagnosis

why_it_outranked_alternatives: Current evidence showed no unresolved rank 1-4 issues (no structural violations, 375/375 canonical tests passing, no replay mismatches, and zero behavioral/invariant totals), so the highest unresolved bounded issue was rank 5: missing instrumentation for bomb timer remaining in contract diagnostics and replay completeness checks.

files_changed.change: Added bomb_time_remaining_s to contract diagnostics input/output payload.
Extracted bomb timer remaining from frame bomb-phase payload and passed it to contract diagnostics.
Normalized raw bomb timer fields and carried canonical seconds into bomb_phase_time_remaining.
Added bomb_time_remaining_s to required contract diagnostics completeness keys.
Updated diagnostics tests for bomb_time_remaining_s input and output assertions.
Added parity assertion that bomb_time_remaining_s key exists in contract diagnostics.
Added assertion that bo3 snapshot bomb timer is normalized and stored in bomb_phase_time_remaining.
Added assertion that replay completeness required keys include bomb_time_remaining_s.

validation_performed.result: bomb_time_remaining_s present in required keys; presence_rate=1.0; missing_count=0
bomb_time_remaining_s present in required keys; presence_rate=1.0; missing_count=0

before_after_evidence.before: contract_diagnostics omitted bomb_time_remaining_s (probe: has_bomb_time_remaining_s False) and replay completeness keys did not include bomb_time_remaining_s.
before_after_evidence.after: contract_diagnostics now emits bomb_time_remaining_s, bo3 normalization carries bomb timer into frame bomb-phase state, and replay completeness includes bomb_time_remaining_s with full coverage.

unresolved_risks: Canonical replay fixtures provide limited planted-bomb timer variety, so additional source-format variants may still be uncovered later.
This run addresses instrumentation completeness, not timer-pressure calibration quality.
stop_reason: Stopped after fixing the selected rank-5 instrumentation gap with minimal changes and repeated targeted + canonical validation; further work would expand into broader calibration scope.
